items.title: Boards of Canada Soundtrack Backrooms End Credits
items.summary: A song from their new album, Inferno, plays at the end of the A24 horror film

items.title: M.I.A. Sues Kid Cudi Over Tour Removal
items.summary: She claims he caused Live Nation to breach the contract, in which she was owed nearly $3 million

items.title: DMX Gets His Own Street in Yonkers
items.summary: The corner of School Street and Brooke Street will be renamed “Earl DMX Simmons Way” in honor of the late rapper

items.title: Highlife and Gang Gang Dance’s Doug Shaw Dies at 43
items.summary: The veteran New York musician died this week following a stroke
